meaning: adj.医师的,医药的,医疗的,药物的
examples: Objective: To raise iatric quality of rooming-in and reduce the death rate of the neonates.
Results Of 7 types, 48 complications were found, and the iatric factor was the most common cause.
It is inevitable for the use of iatric consumptive material in hospital to increase along with the increase of the surgery patients amount.
